terms.definition: A type of polymer with conjugated double bonds or overlapping p-orbitals along its backbone, allowing for unique electronic properties due to delocalized electrons.

chebi.name: conjugated polymer
chebi.definition: A polymer, composed of conjugated macromolecules.

terms.definition: A computational quantum mechanical method used in physics and chemistry to investigate the electronic structure of many-body systems by solving the Schrödinger equation using a self-consistent field approximation.

context_snippets.text: 2 Methodology All density functional theory (DFT) calculations were performed with the real-space projector augmented wavefunction (PAW) method code gpaw [22].

terms.definition: A graph or data representation of the absorbance versus wavelength that shows how a material absorbs light across different wavelengths, often measured using techniques like DFT calculations.
